utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh honey , I am so sorry , you were right , this feels great !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: See ? And you do not care if people are staring , it is just for a second cause then you are gone !

emotion_cause.span: 4_And you do not care if people are staring , it is just for a second cause then you are gone !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Gone ! I mean its amazing Pheebs . I feel so free and so graceful . Hey ! Look out for the horse ! Sorry !

emotion_cause.span: 5_I mean its amazing Pheebs . I feel so free and so graceful .
